news.title:
Nirmal Bang cut estimates for defence stocks, citing market corrections, risks.
Stocks like BEL, HAL face mixed impacts from Iran-Israel conflict, cost pressures.
news.summary:

news.title:
Hindustan Aeronautics announced Dr. S D Premkumar's resignation as Independent Director.
The resignation was communicated via email dated April 5, 2026.
news.summary:
Hindustan Aeronautics announced Dr. S D Premkumar's resignation as Independent Director.
The resignation was communicated via email dated April 5, 2026.

news.title:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.
news.summary:
India plans 100 airports, 200 helipads to boost regional connectivity, benefiting stocks like HAL, GMR, and others.
Key beneficiaries include HAL, GMR Airports, IndiGo, L&T, and Adani Enterprises due to growth in aviation infrastructure.

news.title:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.
news.summary:
HAL, BEL, and other defence stocks are set to benefit from geopolitical tensions and India's rising defence deals with Germany, France, and Israel.
HAL's revenue rose 10.7% YoY; BEL's surged 23.7% YoY, driven by strong order books. Defence budget hike to 15.2% in FY26-27 boosts growth.

news.title:
HAL penalizes GE for delays in F404 engine deliveries for Tejas Mk1A jets.
HAL expects six jets ready by April and 20 engines by 2H CY26 per GE's assurance.
news.summary:
HAL penalizes GE for delays in F404 engine deliveries for Tejas Mk1A jets.
HAL expects six jets ready by April and 20 engines by 2H CY26 per GE's assurance.

news.title:
Goldman Sachs maintains Neutral on HAL with ₹5,255 target, citing 4.1% YoY FY26 revenue growth.
Q4FY26 revenue may decline 4.4% YoY due to delays; margins supported by other income.
news.summary:

news.title:
CLSA cuts HAL target price to ₹5,175 from ₹5,436; sees ₹25B orders FY27-30.
Key drivers include GE engine deliveries and GE 414 MII; HAL stays strong in defense.
news.summary:

news.title:
Oracle Financial Services and HAL are recommended as holds and buys, respectively, with positive long-term outlooks.
ONGC receives a sell call due to market risks, while Gail is attractive at current levels with a target of Rs 160-165.
news.summary:

news.title:
HAL shares rose 4% despite missing Q4 guidance, reflecting market optimism.
VST Tillers reported a 37% decline in sales, indicating a challenging quarter.
news.summary:

news.title:
Citi maintains 'Buy' on Hindustan Aeronautics with Rs 5,560 target price.
Positive outlook driven by 5% higher order inflows, strong backlog, and robust repair demand.
news.summary:
Citi maintains 'Buy' on Hindustan Aeronautics with Rs 5,560 target price.

news.title:
HAL reports provisional FY26 revenue of ₹32,250 cr, up from ₹30,981 cr YoY.
Revenue growth achieved despite LCA Mk1A, HTT 40 delivery delays due to supply chain issues.
news.summary:
HAL reports provisional FY26 revenue of ₹32,250 cr, up from ₹30,981 cr YoY.

news.title:
ICICI Securities highlights India's defence sector as a long-term play, with HAL among top picks due to strong growth visibility and order pipeline.
BEL, BDL, and niche players like PTC Industries may benefit from rising capex, exports, and localisation in tech-driven defence manufacturing.
news.summary:

BEL, BDL, and niche players like PTC Industries may benefit from rising capex, exports, and localisation in tech-driven defence manufacturing.

news.title:
Defence stocks like BEL, HAL, and Garden Reach surge post ₹2.38L crore DAC approvals.
Approvals boost FY23 defence budget to ₹6.73L cr; triple last year's ₹2.2L cr.
news.summary:
Defence stocks like BEL, HAL, and Garden Reach surge post ₹2.38L crore DAC approvals.
Approvals boost FY23 defence budget to ₹6.73L cr; triple last year's ₹2.2L cr.

news.title:
Sensex fell 2.25%, Nifty 50 dropped 2.09%, eroding ₹9 lakh crore market cap as 906 stocks hit 52-week lows.
Stocks like HAL, Tata Motors, IDBI Bank, and UCO Bank hit lows; near-term sentiment fragile amid geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
Sensex fell 2.25%, Nifty 50 dropped 2.09%, eroding ₹9 lakh crore market cap as 906 stocks hit 52-week lows.
Stocks like HAL, Tata Motors, IDBI Bank, and UCO Bank hit lows; near-term sentiment fragile amid geopolitical risks.

news.title:
Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) hit a 52-week low of ₹3,580.1, falling 10% in 6 days, underperforming Sensex in 2026.
HAL's strong order book ensures revenue visibility, but AMCA program concerns and supply issues pose challenges.
news.summary:
Hindustan Aeronautics (HAL) hit a 52-week low of ₹3,580.1, falling 10% in 6 days, underperforming Sensex in 2026.
HAL's strong order book ensures revenue visibility, but AMCA program concerns and supply issues pose challenges.

news.title:
